schema.title: Response Get Model List Chatsvc Api V1 Models Get
Response Get Sessions Chatsvc Api V1 Sessions Get

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Prompt to provide to the LLM

tools.title: Tools
tools.description: List of tools to use for the prompt. If empty, uses all active tools.

config.description: [DEPRECATED as of 2024.12 this field has no effect] Configuration for type of chat model to use.

toolInfo.title: Toolinfo
toolInfo.description: Extra information for the available tools sent

links.title: Links
links.description: List of hyperlinks for the response

screen_navigation.title: Screen Navigation
screen_navigation.description: Screen ID or URL for screen navigation

messages.description: List of messages for a particular session

updatedOn.title: Updatedon
updatedOn.description: Date the session was last updated

format.title: Format
format.description: Format of the document.  Valid file types are docx, csv, html, txt, pdf, md, doc, xlsx, xls

name.title: Name
name.description: Name of the document.  The document file name can only contain alphanumeric characters, whitespace characters, hyphens, parentheses, and square brackets. The name can't contain more than one consecutive whitespace character

role.title: Role
role.description: Role of the message being sent, supported values are user or assistant

content.title: Content
content.description: List of message content. Can be a mix of text and images

type.title: Type
type.description: Type of message content, either text, image, or document and 'cache_control' and should be used only when role = 'user'

data.title: Data
data.description: The content of the message. If type is image, data should be a base 64 encoded image. If type is text, data should be the text content of the message.  If type is document, data should be a dictionary with fields name (file name without extension), format (pdf, docx, etc), data (base64 string representation of file). Type = 'cache_control' then content can be true/false

model.title: Model
model.description: Name of the model to use, if none provided defaults to CLAUDE

version.title: Version
version.description: Specific id/version of the model to use, Model is required for this field.

useConverseApi.title: Useconverseapi
useConverseApi.description: Use the converse api to send prompt

safetyGuardrail.title: Safetyguardrail
safetyGuardrail.description: Use the converse api to send prompt

system_cache.title: System Cache
system_cache.description: Indicates whether to cache system prompt or not. Syatem cache is supported only whem model is NOVA or model is CLAUDE with useConverseAPI=TRUE

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Name of company that provides the specific model

versions.title: Versions
versions.description: Version detials of the specific model

max_response.title: Max Response
max_response.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate a response

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2.

top_p.title: Top P
top_p.description: An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass.

top_k.title: Top K
top_k.description: An alternative to sampling with temperature, called top-k sampling, where the model considers the results of the K most likely tokens.

stop_sequence.title: Stop Sequence
stop_sequence.description: Up to 4 sequences where the API will stop generating further tokens.

frequency_penalty.title: Frequency Penalty
frequency_penalty.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on their existing frequency in the text so far, decreasing the model's likelihood to repeat the same line verbatim.

presence_penalty.title: Presence Penalty
presence_penalty.description: Number between -2.0 and 2.0. Positive values penalize new tokens based on whether they appear in the text so far, increasing the model's likelihood to talk about new topics.

items.title: Items
items.description: List of items returned in a paginated response

next_page.title: Next Page
next_page.description: index of the next page if it exists

previous_page.title: Previous Page
previous_page.description: index of the previous page if it exists

model.title: Model
model.description: Name of the model to use, if none provided defaults to CLAUDE

version.title: Version
version.description: Specific id/version of the model to use, Model is required for this field.

useConverseApi.title: Useconverseapi
useConverseApi.description: Use the converse api to send prompt

safetyGuardrail.title: Safetyguardrail
safetyGuardrail.description: Use the converse api to send prompt

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Prompt to provide to the LLM

document.description: Document to use for the prompt

version.title: Version
version.description: Verison of the the model selected

token_usage.description: Token usage for the prompt completion

guardrail_info.description: guardrail info for the prompt completion

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether to enable reasoning for the model

stub.title: Stub
stub.description: Respond with the stubbed api response for the tool

default.title: Default
default.description: Optional value determining if this model is default. Only one model should be the default

ToolModelDetail.title: ToolModelDetail
ToolModelDetail.description: Model to configure llm for tool or agent use

ToolModelResponse.title: ToolModelResponse
ToolModelResponse.description: Response for list of tools available for tool or agent use

description.title: Description
description.description: Description of the specific model version

token_context_size.title: Token Context Size
token_context_size.description: Context token size of the model version

isFamilyDefault.title: Isfamilydefault
isFamilyDefault.description: Whether this version is the default for its family

isDefault.title: Isdefault
isDefault.description: Whether this version is the global default

iddpRateLimit.title: Iddpratelimit
iddpRateLimit.description: IDDP rate limit for the version

standardGuardrail.title: Standardguardrail
standardGuardrail.description: Whether the version supports standard guardrails
